author: codex
scope: relation endpoint-shape cleanup prep only; durable retire+replace mechanism planned but not applied

bucket.name: part_of_program project-to-event rows
bucket.why_coherent: After excluding retired submissions, prior relation cleanup batches017-033, and missing-target repair work, the next largest exact endpoint-shape bucket is three part_of_program rows from project subjects to event objects. Current endpoint-shape rules allow part_of_program from project or route subjects to project or entity objects, not events. Two rows have source text that clearly names the program/project object and can be retargeted to existing canonical project records. One Grade Crossing row is already covered by a valid has_timeline_event project -> event relation, so the malformed duplicate is prepared as retire-only.

checkpoint_context.method: Read-only inventory over canonical JSONL with current endpoint-shape rules; excluded retired submissions, prior codex relation cleanup prep originals through batch033, and missing-target repair work. Did not run CLI validate, materialize, export-jsonl, DB repair/publish, or provider-backed commands.

endpoint_shape_probe.part_of_program project->event: Relation kind part_of_program expects project|route -> project|entity, got project -> event.

local_validation.tooling: createSubmissionEntry dry run for replacement tool_args plus relationEndpointIssues; relationEndpointShapeIssue checked against canonical endpoint kinds for each replacement. Retire-only candidate checked by source evidence and existing valid relation inspection.

command_evidence.result: 1 before writing; artifact did not already exist.

command_evidence.command: endpoint-shape inventory script excluding retired submissions, cleanup batches017-033, and missing-target repair submissions
command_evidence.result: Remaining unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape total was 43; selected exact bucket part_of_program project->event had count 3.

command_evidence.command: canonical JSONL inspection for relation_gcm-east-side-access, relation_gcsip-part-of-grade-xing-improvement-program, and relation_westbury-garage-main-line-expansion
command_evidence.result: Confirmed all three are current canonical part_of_program rows with project subjects and event objects, and captured original submission ids/local ids/evidence refs.

command_evidence.command: source block inspection for meeting_doc_101026#p045_c0006, meeting_doc_91576#p002_c0025/#p006_c0015, and meeting_doc_26886#p033_c0005/#p033_c0007
command_evidence.result: Confirmed East Side Access and LIRR Main Line Expansion project targets are source-backed; confirmed Grade Crossing row duplicates an existing valid project->event timeline relation.

command_evidence.command: createSubmissionEntry dry run for two part_of_program project->project replacements
command_evidence.result: Both replacement entries accepted with no relationEndpointIssues and no endpoint-shape issue.

command_evidence.command: collision guard script over retired.json, data/submissions, and prior prep artifacts through batch033
command_evidence.result: No original retired/prior hits and no replacement submission id or local observation id collisions.

retire.reason: The original relation points part_of_program at a board meeting event, but the cited source text identifies East Side Access as the program/project context for Grand Central Madison terminal work.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison part of East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: Contract VM014 provides engineering and fabrication for elevators and escalators for the East Side Access project and maintenance at the new Grand Central Madison Terminal.

payload.description: Replacement for malformed part_of_program project -> event relation; source identifies Grand Central Madison terminal vertical circulation work as part of the East Side Access project.

retire.reason: Retire-only. The original relation uses part_of_program for project -> event agenda context. The same project/event association is already represented by current canonical relation_safety-committee-meeting-presented-gcsip as has_timeline_event project -> event with accepted endpoint shape, so adding a replacement would duplicate an existing valid relation.

retire.original_object_name: Westbury Parking Garage Expected Opening March 2021

source_evidence.source_quote: As part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project

retire.reason: The original relation points part_of_program at an opening event, but the cited source text identifies LIRR's Main Line Expansion project as the program/project context for the Westbury Parking Garage.

tool_args.label: Westbury Parking Garage part of LIRR Main Line Expansion
tool_args.raw_text: As part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project, a 667 space parking garage was constructed on the north side of the Westbury station.

payload.description: Replacement for malformed part_of_program project -> event relation; source states the Westbury Parking Garage was constructed as part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: As part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project, a 667 space parking garage was constructed on the north side of the Westbury station.
